name: ShengHua Entertainment Communication co.,Ltd.
summary: ShengHua Entertainment Communication co.,Ltd. engages in the television program production and screenwriting, film production and distribution, and art performing activities in Taiwan and China. It also provides drama series, as well as engages in the literary and artistic creation, corporate image planning, actor brokerage, and graphic system businesses. In addition, it is involved in the investment consulting, business management consulting, and business information consulting activities. The company was formerly known as Shenghua Entertainment Production Co., Ltd. and changed its name to ShengHua Entertainment Communication co.,Ltd. in June 2012. ShengHua Entertainment Communication co.,Ltd. was founded in 2000 and is based in Taipei, Taiwan.
